actors.name: User
actors.description: Default system user acting on the system.

missingInformation.description: No error paths, input validation errors, or recovery strategies are described.
Input character sizes, numeric limits, or transaction limits are not defined.
User access levels or operation permissions are not specified.
Strict format guidelines (e.g. date shapes, telephone numbers, emails) are missing.

riskAreas.description: Testing blocked on: "No error paths, input validation errors, or recovery strategies are described." - Tests cannot cover validation error boundaries, leaving security and stability paths unverified.
Testing blocked on: "Input character sizes, numeric limits, or transaction limits are not defined." - Without limit specs, boundary value analysis (BVA) test steps cannot be derived.
Testing blocked on: "User access levels or operation permissions are not specified." - Unauthorized request boundaries (e.g. attempting actions as a guest) cannot be verified.
Testing blocked on: "Strict format guidelines (e.g. date shapes, telephone numbers, emails) are missing." - Valid vs invalid format test strings cannot be validated dynamically.

candidates.text: How should the system handle validation errors or network failures for the "dummy_spec" feature?
options: Return a 400 Bad Request JSON response
Display a localized modal error message
candidates.rationale: Determines validation outcome formats. Required for response code verification.
candidates.skipRisk: WARNING: Skipping will prevent writing API-level validation error assertion steps.

candidates.text: What are the boundary limits (e.g. min/max values, length boundaries) for input fields in this feature?
candidates.rationale: No numeric or string size limits defined. Traditional boundary value analysis is blocked.
candidates.skipRisk: WARNING: Skipping this boundaries question will lead to missing boundary limits test steps.

candidates.text: Which user roles or access levels are authorized to trigger this feature?
candidates.rationale: Decides security access mapping. Crucial for boundary test case design.
candidates.skipRisk: WARNING: Skipping this auth question will result in missing security regression test matrices.

candidates.text: What specific format constraints (e.g. email patterns, date schemas, telephone shapes) apply here?
candidates.rationale: Non-blocking enhancement detail. Good to have, but does not block suite compilation.
candidates.skipRisk: No risk. Minor impact on non-critical scope details.
